title: Osijek、Osijek-Baranja — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Osijek、Osijek-Baranjaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

OsijekはOsijek-Baranjaにある人口108,048の都市です。The charming capital of Slavonia, a Baroque city on the Drava River with a beautifully restored old town, a vibrant university life, and a rich culinary tradition.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
